footer.tagline: We build the tools. You recommend them. Everyone wins.

hero.title: Better apps to learn better. Built on cognitive science.
hero.subtitle: Etudia builds learning apps for every subject that deserves a better tool — degrees, exams, skills. Spaced repetition, active recall and gamification at the core.

method.title: Science-backed learning
method.subtitle: Every Etudia app is built on principles proven by cognitive science research.

spacedRepetition.title: Spaced repetition
spacedRepetition.description: The algorithm identifies what you're forgetting and shows it again at the optimal time.

testingEffect.title: Testing effect
testingEffect.description: Testing yourself is more effective than re-reading. Our apps are built around quizzes and active exercises.

gamification.title: Gamification
gamification.description: Streaks, XP, visible progress — every session brings you closer to your goal.

examFormat.title: Real exam format
examFormat.description: Practice in the exact conditions of your exam. Each app mirrors the real test format.

featured.title: One app per subject. Yours might already be ready.
featured.subtitle: Learning tools built for every field — ready to recommend.
featured.comingSoonSubtitle: These apps are currently in development.

items.name: Sarah M.
items.quote: ETUDIET helped me go from 10 to 16 in food science. The targeted quizzes make all the difference.

items.name: Amadou K.
items.quote: BacSuccess helps me study everywhere, even when I don't have access to my textbooks. I gained 4 points on my last mock exams.

items.name: Lea D.
items.quote: I recommended ETUDIET to my community and I earn my commission every month. The product is great, it's easy to talk about.

ambassador.title: You create educational content? Your audience deserves the best tools.
ambassador.subtitle: Join the Etudia ambassador program. Recommend our apps and earn a commission on every subscription.

step1.description: Choose the app that fits your niche.

step2.title: Share with your audience

step3.title: Earn your commission monthly
step3.description: 30 to 50% recurring commission on every subscription.

ambassador.trust: Free signup · No commitment · Monthly automatic payout

testimonial.name: Fatou S.
testimonial.quote: In 3 months, I generated 47 subscriptions through my link. With 40% commission, it gives me a stable extra income every month.

hero.title: Got an audience? Turn it into recurring revenue.
hero.subtitle: We provide you with an app ready to recommend, you share it with your community, you earn your commission every month.

commission.title: 30-50% commission
commission.description: On every subscription from your link. Recurring revenue as long as the user stays subscribed.

code.title: Zero hassle
code.description: No coding, no inventory, no customer support. We handle everything, you focus on your content.

assets.title: Everything's ready for you
assets.description: Visuals, video ideas, key arguments. We give you everything to create content easily.

dashboard.title: Track your earnings live
dashboard.description: Your personal dashboard shows exactly how much you earn, how many people signed up through your link.

simulator.title: Calculate Your Revenue
simulator.subtitle: Estimate how much you could earn

choose.title: Pick an app from the catalog

assets.title: We give you your unique affiliate link + marketing assets

promote.title: You talk to your audience: videos, posts, stories

earn.title: You earn your commission every month on each subscriber

items.a: It depends on your audience size and conversion rate. Use the simulator above to estimate. A creator with 10,000 subscribers and 2% conversion on a €12.90 app with 40% commission earns about €1,000/month.
Yes. You can promote as many apps as you want from the catalog. Each has its own affiliate link.
By bank transfer every month. You receive your commission on all active subscriptions generated through your link.
A simple and transparent partnership agreement. No exclusivity, no time commitment. You can stop whenever you want.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: Etudia is me — a passionate developer who believes we can build better products and distribute them differently. No ads, no crazy marketing budgets. Just good tools carried by creators that their community trusts.

manifesto.title: Our belief
manifesto.content: Paid marketing is an arms race. Acquisition costs are skyrocketing, margins are collapsing, and mediocre products survive on ad budgets. We believe in a different model: build excellent products and distribute them through people who have their audience's trust. No ads. No growth hacks. Just great products carried by the right people.

value1.title: Everything's open
value1.description: Your earnings, our numbers, our mistakes. All cards on the table.

value2.title: We move fast
value2.description: A product built in 30 days, not 6 months.

value4.title: Products we maintain
value4.description: Every tool is maintained and improved. We don't abandon anything.

program.title: How We Build a Product
program.description: Our process has been optimized to build a complete and functional application in just 30 days. From market validation to production launch, with our creator ambassadors.

cta.title: Join the adventure
cta.description: Whether you're a creator or have an app idea, there's a place for you at Etudia.
